title: Hackathon 2026 - Code for Change
description: A 36-hour hackathon where students build solutions for real-world problems. Prizes worth ₹1,50,000. Open to all engineering branches.

title: Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering supervised learning, neural networks, and model deployment with scikit-learn and TensorFlow.

title: Technical Talk: Future of Generative AI
description: Industry expert talk on large language models, diffusion models, and practical applications in software development.

title: Robotics Competition – RoboVIT 2026
description: Annual robotics competition with line-following, maze-solving, and freestyle robot battle categories. Teams of 2-4 students.

title: Cybersecurity CTF Challenge
description: Capture The Flag competition covering web security, cryptography, reverse engineering, and forensics. All skill levels welcome.

title: Data Science Bootcamp
description: 3-day intensive bootcamp on data analysis, visualization with Python, pandas, matplotlib, and building ML pipelines.

title: Inter-College Cricket Tournament
description: T20 cricket tournament between VIT colleges. Registrations open for teams of 15 players.

title: Cultural Fest – Riviera 2026
description: VIT's annual cultural festival featuring music, dance, drama, art exhibitions, and celebrity performances.

title: Cloud Computing Seminar: AWS & Azure
description: Deep dive into cloud architecture, serverless functions, containerization with Docker, and Kubernetes orchestration.

title: Entrepreneurship Meetup
description: Connect with student entrepreneurs, startup founders, and investors. Pitch your ideas and get mentorship.

title: Web Development Bootcamp
description: Full-stack web development crash course covering React, Node.js, REST APIs, and deployment on Vercel and AWS.

title: Open Source Contribution Sprint
description: Guided session to make your first open-source contribution to popular Python and JavaScript repositories.

title: Photography Exhibition – LensVIT
description: Annual photography exhibition showcasing student work across nature, architecture, street, and portrait categories.

title: Blockchain and Web3 Workshop
description: Introduction to blockchain fundamentals, smart contract development with Solidity, and NFT creation.

title: Badminton Championship
description: Singles and doubles badminton championship open to all VIT students. Knockout format across 3 days.

title: AI in Healthcare Seminar
description: How artificial intelligence is transforming diagnostics, drug discovery, and personalized medicine.

title: Game Development Workshop – Unity & Godot
description: Build your first 2D and 3D game using Unity and Godot. Cover physics, scripting, asset management, and publishing.

title: Debate Championship: Tech & Ethics
description: Formal debate competition on topics like AI regulation, data privacy, and the future of automation and jobs.

title: DevOps & CI/CD Pipeline Workshop
description: Practical session on GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker, and setting up automated test and deployment pipelines.

title: Mathematics Olympiad – VIT MathFest 2026
description: Annual math competition covering number theory, combinatorics, algebra, and calculus. Open to all UG students.
